message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for DataFrame.rename_columns (2 cases)

Append 2 live-pandas oracle tests covering DataFrame.rename_columns():

- rename_columns_single: 2-col frame, rename "a" -> "alpha"
- rename_columns_multiple: 3-col frame, rename "a" -> "alpha" and
  "c" -> "gamma" simultaneously

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
frame.rename(columns={...})), runs the Rust DataFrame.rename_columns
(&[(from, to), ...]), and asserts parity via
compare_dataframe_expected. DataFrameRenameColumns was already
wired through the Frame response branch; this fills the live-oracle
test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-ufzq7]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
